title: Craftable Uncraftable Items
description: This mod adds crafting to uncraftable items!
body:
If You Have Got Any Good Idea You Must Come To My Discord Server! https://discord.gg/bQYFc6bRrt Craftable Uncraftable Items is a mod that adds crafting recipes for vanilla Minecraft items that are normally uncraftable. Instead of introducing new items, it makes existing items that cannot normally be crafted obtainable through the crafting table. Why Use It? - Craft items that are normally inaccessible in Survival mode. - Reduce the need for long and repetitive loot hunts. - Provide more freedom for technical, sandbox, and custom gameplay worlds.
